generated_oml:
instance DigitalTwinInstance : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital twin instance for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring I_M for the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder providing motor angle for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox position encoder providing gearbox angle for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance GearboxEncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current data streams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor encoder angle data streams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance GearboxEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox encoder angle data streams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque estimate from current and angle in real‑time"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from encoder angles in real‑time"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration from velocity change in real‑time"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction model implementation: Coulomb‑Viscous"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction model implementation: Stribeck"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction model implementation: Dahl"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction model implementation: LuGre"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of permanent‑magnet synchronous motor for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance FullSystemSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Full system Simulink model including motor, gearbox, and friction variants"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorGearwheelConnectorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component‑connector diagram of motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SimulatedSystemTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SimulatedMotorVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque from Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorTorqueDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox torque from Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedGearboxTorqueDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SimulatedSystemTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated total system torque from Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedSystemTorqueDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SimulatedMotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor angular velocity from Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingComponent
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorVelocityDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating real‑time streaming of raw sensor data to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SimulinkExecution : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink execution environment for running simulation models of the first axis joint"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used to create structural models of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:enables EngineeringModelingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance AASAssetRegistry : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset description and metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables DTServiceAssetMetadata
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DashboardUI : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard UI for real‑time visualization of monitoring data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom processing component linking traces and models for friction analysis and decision making"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring via dashboard compares simulated and measured torque/velocity for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of monitoring data on dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous, multi‑physics‑aware identification of joint friction using simulated and measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, RecalibrateMotorAction, RecalibrateGearboxAction, AdjustFrictionModelAction
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ControllerTuningRecommendationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides controller tuning recommendations based on friction trend analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides TuningRecommendationInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MaintenancePlanningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides maintenance scheduling insights and actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceRecommendationInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance EngineeringModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for maintaining engineering models in SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides EngineeringModelInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DTServiceAssetMetadata : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for accessing asset metadata via AAS"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetMetadataInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) for first axis joint"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time dashboard visualization of joint torque, velocity, and friction trends"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance TuningRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended controller tuning settings based on friction trends"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Maintenance scheduling recommendation to mitigate friction wear"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance EngineeringModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on structural model updates in SysML"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance AssetMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on asset metadata from AAS"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance RecalibrateMotorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recalibrates motor for friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance RecalibrateGearboxAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recalibrates gearbox for friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance AdjustFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts friction model parameters in simulation for better match"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation; sensor data and simulation outputs are updated synchronously with the physical system; identical timing of data streams and processing, but explicit sampling interval not provided."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of asset, purpose, sources, models, processing, and data traces according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM); the first axis is linked via an AAS; purpose is FrictionDerivation; sources (measured I_M, output angle) feed the processing component that runs Simulink models to produce simulated traces; all components interconnected in a local server environment."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (ideal frictionless baseline model), Manufacture (actual robot built), Operation (real‑time digital shadow with live data), and Continuous evolution via model adaptation during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Physical sensor accuracy and traceability, model verification by comparing simulated and measured torque/velocity; uncertainties due to load, temperature, wear mitigated by continuous identification; model validity assessed by residual analysis and parameter adaptation; no explicit V&V framework specified."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data transmitted over MQTT to the digital shadow; the shadow consumes data via MQTT topics; AAS likely communicates over HTTP/REST or OPC UA (not specified), but MQTT is the primary network protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adoption of standard modeling languages – SysML for engineering models, Simulink for simulation; Asset Administration Shell follows the Industrie 4.0 standard defined by the Industrie 4.0 Forum; reference models (DSRM) and standard modeling conventions are employed."
]
